A

apply(Point) - Method in interface ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.board.BoardBounds
Wraps or validates point according to this boundary rule.
apply(Point) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.board.SolidWallBounds
 
apply(Point) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.board.WrapAroundBounds
Wraps point using modular arithmetic so it always lands inside the board.

RUNNING - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.GameState
Game loop is running and accepting input.

S

scheduleGrowth(int) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.Snake
Schedules a change in snake length to be applied over subsequent Snake.move(ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.entity.Direction) calls.
selfCollision() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.Snake
Detects self-collision by checking whether the current head appears more than once in the body (which happens when the snake loops back into itself after a move).
SHRINK - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.entity.FoodType
 
Snake - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model
Manages the snake body as an ordered sequence of grid cells.
Snake(Point) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.Snake
Creates a snake with a single segment at startPosition.
SnakeApplication - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake
JavaFX application entry point.
SnakeApplication() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.SnakeApplication
 
SolidWallBounds - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.board
Classic boundary rule: moving outside the board is fatal.
SolidWallBounds(int, int) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.board.SolidWallBounds
 
speedupPerLevel() - Method in record class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.GameConfig
Returns the value of the speedupPerLevel record component.
start(Stage) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.SnakeApplication
 
step() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.GameModel
Advances the game by one tick.

T

teleportHead(Point) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.snake.model.Snake
Replaces the head cell without changing the body length.
